description_long: This is a small, single-story convenience store modeled after a 7-Eleven, featuring a flat black roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade is adorned with the iconic green, orange, and red stripes, a large 7-Eleven logo, and illuminated signage with both English and Asian characters. The entrance is glass, flanked by a set of cardboard boxes and a vending machine, suggesting active commercial use. The side and rear walls are plain gray brick, with a blue dumpster and several black trash bags positioned along one side, and an HVAC unit mounted on the opposite wall. The building sits on a black asphalt base, simulating a parking lot or sidewalk area. No large display windows are present, and the overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function over decorative elements.
description: A compact, flat-roofed 7-Eleven convenience store with colorful signage, a glass entrance, and utilitarian brick walls, set on an asphalt base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with glass doors, colorful 7-Eleven signage, cardboard boxes, and a vending machine.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a blue dumpster, black trash bags, and the plain brick wall with minimal decoration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the utilitarian back of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing an HVAC unit mounted on the wall and a partial view of the front signage and entrance.
attribute_storefront_signage: Large illuminated 7-Eleven logo and signage with green, orange, and red stripes, plus bilingual text in English and Asian characters, mounted above the entrance and extending horizontally across the facade.
attribute_glass_entrance_doors: Yes, a single set of transparent glass swinging doors with a metal frame and visible handles.
